block_01: Most traders know about such common patterns as triangles and wedges. The Diamond pattern, true to its name, is a bit more rare to find. But once you do, it indicates a strong trend reversal and can be highly beneficial to a trader.
block_02: This pattern can appear on any timeframe and any asset. A Diamond forms at the end of a trend, so it can be both bearish (Diamond bottoms) or bullish (Diamond tops). Are you ready to start investigating the chart in a search for Diamonds?
block_03: Check out the full article to learn to apply this pattern in your trading.
